item.title: Combination Smoke and Carbon Monoxide (CO) Detectors Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Failure to Alert Consumers to Fire; Sold Exclusively on Amazon.com by Treatlife Technology
item.company: Online at Amazon.com from November 2025 through April 2026 for about $40.
item.brand: Online at Amazon.com from November 2025 through April 2026 for about $40.
item.product: Treatlife Smoke and Carbon Monoxide (CO) Detectors
item.summary: This recall involves Treatlife Smoke and Carbon Monoxide (CO) Detectors. The alarms are AA battery operated and have a colored light and test button. The alarms are white and circular in shape. The FCC ID "2ANDL-XR3" and the date of manufacture "2023.DEC.02" are printed on the bottom side of the alarm.
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased: Treatlife Smoke and Carbon Monoxide (CO) Detectors.
item.remedy: Consumers should contact Treatlife Technology to receive a full refund. Consumers should continue using the recalled detectors until they purchase and install a replacement detector. Once a new detector is installed, consumers should write "recalled" on the recalled product, remove the batteries, dispose of the detector in their household garbage, and dispose of the batteries in accordance with local and state regulations.
item.payoutAmount: Repair, refund, replacement, or other remedy if stated by the CPSC notice
